containerVersion.name: CRBOX Analytics
containerVersion.description: CRBOX GTM container (updated May 2026) — 1 Constant + 42 Data Layer Variables, 34 Custom Event triggers, 35 tags (GA4 Configuration + 34 GA4 Event tags). Added 17 portal events (login, signup, package search, invoice upload, quote submit, portal_section_view, chat, outbound_click). Fixed calculator_result tag parameter mapping (weight_bucket/value_bucket/destination_country). Import and replace YOUR_GTM_CONTAINER_ID before publishing; GA4 Measurement ID G-B5BPHFRR18 is already set.

variable.name: GA4 Measurement ID
variable.notes: GA4 Measurement ID is G-B5BPHFRR18 — already set.

tag.name: GA4 Configuration
tag.notes: Fires on All Pages. GA4 Measurement ID is G-B5BPHFRR18 — already set.

tag.name: GA4 - cta_afiliate_click
tag.notes: Conversion event. Mark as conversion in GA4: Admin → Events → cta_afiliate_click → Mark as conversion.

tag.name: GA4 - whatsapp_click
tag.notes: Conversion event. Mark as conversion in GA4: Admin → Events → whatsapp_click → Mark as conversion.

tag.name: GA4 - contact_form_submit
tag.notes: Conversion event. Mark as conversion in GA4: Admin → Events → contact_form_submit → Mark as conversion.

tag.name: GA4 - calculator_result
tag.notes: Conversion event. Mark as conversion in GA4: Admin → Events → calculator_result → Mark as conversion. FIXED May 2026: replaced erroneous package_weight_kg/destination with weight_bucket, value_bucket, destination_country to match analytics.js payload.

tag.name: GA4 - scroll_depth
tag.notes: Disable GTM's built-in Scroll Depth trigger to avoid duplicate events — CRBOX tracks scroll depth natively in analytics.js.

tag.name: GA4 - login_success
tag.notes: Conversion event. Mark as conversion in GA4: Admin → Events → login_success → Mark as conversion.

tag.name: GA4 - signup_success
tag.notes: Conversion event. Mark as conversion in GA4: Admin → Events → signup_success → Mark as conversion.

tag.name: GA4 - package_search
tag.notes: Privacy: only query length bucket captured — never the query text itself.

tag.name: GA4 - invoice_upload_start
tag.notes: Privacy: MIME type normalized to extension string — no filename, raw MIME, size, or invoice content captured.

tag.name: GA4 - invoice_upload_success
tag.notes: Conversion event. Mark as conversion in GA4: Admin → Events → invoice_upload_success → Mark as conversion.

tag.name: GA4 - quote_submit
tag.notes: Conversion event. Mark as conversion in GA4: Admin → Events → quote_submit → Mark as conversion. Replaces legacy quote_submitted event.

tag.name: GA4 - chat_message_sent
tag.notes: Privacy: no message content captured — message_type is always 'text'.

tag.name: GA4 - outbound_click
tag.notes: Privacy: only domain hostname captured — never full URL, path, query params, or fragment.
